name: ERPNext v15
postStartCommand: docker compose up -d && sleep 30 && docker compose exec -T --user frappe backend bench set-config -g db_host db && docker compose exec -T --user frappe backend bench set-config -g redis_cache 'redis://redis-cache:6379' && docker compose exec -T --user frappe backend bench set-config -g redis_queue 'redis://redis-queue:6379' && docker compose exec -T --user frappe backend bench set-config -g redis_socketio 'redis://redis-queue:6379' && tar -xzf sites-backup.tar.gz -C /tmp && docker cp /tmp/sites/frontend erphost-backend-1:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/ && docker compose restart
